entities.name: FLOOD VULNERABILITY ZONE
entities.description: Areas identified as susceptible to flood damage to minimize associated losses

entities.name: FLOOD
entities.description: The natural disaster event causing damage in the river basin

entities.name: HYDRODYNAMIC MODELING
entities.description: A technique used to simulate water flow and identify flood vulnerability zones

entities.name: LOWER DAMODAR RIVER
entities.description: The specific river section in eastern India where the study was conducted

entities.name: EASTERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region containing the lower Damodar river

entities.name: ARCGIS
entities.description: The software environment used for preprocessing data and preparing input geometry

entities.name: SATELLITE IMAGERY
entities.description: High resolution imagery used to prepare river network and bank line data

entities.name: FIELD SURVEY
entities.description: On-site data collection used for model input and validation

entities.name: MANNING'S COEFFICIENT OF ROUGHNESS
entities.description: A parameter used for the calibration of the hydrodynamic model

entities.name: INDEX OF AGREEMENT
entities.description: A metric used to estimate the efficiency and agreement of the model with observed data

entities.name: FLOODING HOTSPOTS
entities.description: Specific areas demarcated by the model as being highly vulnerable to flooding

entities.name: BIFURCATION POINT
entities.description: The point where the Damodar river splits, downstream of which areas are more vulnerable
